topic: Automated invoicing per service for PRO firms — billing 30 clients in the time it used to take to bill three
format: Compare 'how most Oman businesses do X today' with 'how SmartPRO Hub customers do X'
post:
Most PRO firms in Oman aren't losing money to difficult clients. They're losing it to a WhatsApp note nobody followed up on, a service that got done on a Thursday and never made it onto an invoice.

That's a surprisingly common problem for a business built entirely around tracking other people's paperwork.

SmartPRO Hub logs every completed service — work permits, visa renewals, Sanad filings, government documents — the moment it's done. When billing time comes, invoices generate automatically, broken down by service and by client.

The result: 30 clients billed in roughly the time it used to take to handle three.

No hunting through notes. No manual data entry. No line items that quietly disappear.

We built this after seeing the same thing repeatedly — a service gets completed, nobody records it, nobody charges for it. Across 30, 50, 80 clients, that gap compounds quickly into real money left on the table.

Automated per-service invoicing is live on SmartPRO Hub from OMR 25/month. There's a 14-day trial, no credit card required.

If your billing still relies on someone remembering to write something down, it's worth asking what that's actually costing you each month.

Book a 30-minute demo: https://www.thesmartpro.io/demo?utm_source=linkedin&utm_medium=social&utm_campaign=feature-spotlight
